title: Luigi's Sink Plunger - Drain Plunger Sink Unblocker - Plungers for Unblocking - Drain Plungers for Bathroom Kitchen Bath Shower - Unblock Pump with Accordion Bellows
features: Clear Sink Blockages Fast And Easily: Eliminate stubborn sink clogs in just seconds by placing the plunger sink unblocker over the drain and pumping twice. The shower plunger clears more in 10 seconds than traditional plungers

Fix Slow And Blocked Drains Instantly: Whether it’s a slow-draining shower or a fully clogged bath, this plunger removes blockages quickly. It even works when your shower tray is filled with standing water.
Heavy-Duty Power For Tough Clogs: This plunger shower unblocker forces 8x more air than a traditional plunger, using your pressure to blast through blockages. It’s a powerful drain unblocker plunger
Easy to Clean: Made from PE material, it’s simple to maintain. Just spray with bleach and rinse under the tap or shower for a quick, hygienic clean after every use.
Unclog in Minutes: For faster results in sinks or baths, block the overflow with a damp cloth before plunging. This prevents air from escaping, making unclogging quicker and easier.
